backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with role-based access control (admin/user), user profile management, and CRUD operations for categories and products across two stores.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/docs/ii-alternative-origins-man: Manual QA checklist for verifying Internet Identity authentication works correctly on both kelanicosmetics.es and www.kelanicosmetics.es production domains, including troubleshooting steps.
frontend/docs/product-details-modal-hist: Manual QA checklist for validating product details modal browser history navigation behavior (back button, close button, ESC) across homepage, search results, and category pages.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file serving as the global stylesheet entry point for the frontend.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kelani Cosmetics frontend app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Internet Identity alternative origins configuration file listing both https://kelanicosmetics.es and https://www.kelanicosmetics.es as valid authentication origins.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all search engine crawlers full site access and pointing to the sitemap at kelanicosmetics.es/sitemap.xml.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the homepage, contact, and privacy pages of kelanicosmetics.es with their change frequencies and priorities.
frontend/scripts/verify-well-known-ii-al: Brief documentation stub with instructions for verifying the .well-known/ii-alternative-origins file is correctly served after a frontend build.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with instant scroll restoration and renders the RouterProvider alongside the global ToastViewport.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays an access denied screen for non-admin users, showing their Internet Identity principal with a copy button and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminHeade: Top navigation header for the admin panel that includes a sidebar toggle, brand logo, logout button, and a Web Worker-based session keep-alive mechanism.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Login screen for the admin panel that allows users to authenticate via Internet Identity with a loading state during sign-in.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Responsive sidebar navigation for the admin panel with links to all major sections, supporting mobile overlay and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminVerif: Full-screen loading card displayed while admin permissions are being verified after login.
frontend/src/components/admin/categories: Renders a list of category cards with edit, delete, and reorder (up/down) controls, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/CopyIconBu: Icon button that copies provided text to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation after a successful copy.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardN: Clickable card component used on the admin dashboard to navigate to a given route, displaying an icon and title.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/C: Dropdown select component for filtering products by category, fetching categories from a query hook and converting sentinel values to null.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/D: Alert dialog for confirming product deletion that requires the user to enter a specific password before the delete mutation is executed.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/P: Mobile card-based view for displaying a list of products with inline toggles for store stock and featured status, plus edit/delete/copy-barcode actions.
Pagination controls component for the products list, supporting page navigation, page size selection, and ellipsis-based page number display.
Desktop table view for displaying products with inline checkboxes to toggle store stock and featured status, plus edit, delete, and copy-barcode actions.
Modal dialog for creating or editing a product, handling form state for fields like barcode, name, category, price, stock, and photo upload with WebP conversion.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Dele: Confirmation alert dialog for permanently deleting a sale item, invoking the delete mutation on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Sale: Confirmation alert dialog for deactivating a sale item, calling a provided onConfirm callback when the user confirms.
Renders a responsive card grid of sale items with toggle active, edit, and delete actions, including a confirmation dialog for deactivation.
Provides a status filter dropdown (All/Active) for filtering sale items in the admin sales view.
Renders pagination controls for sale items including page size selection, page number buttons with ellipsis, and prev/next navigation.
Displays sale items in a table with columns for product details, pricing, dates, status, and actions (toggle active, edit, delete) including a deactivation confirmation dialog.
Renders a styled badge indicating a sale item's status (active, upcoming, or expired) based on its date range.
Modal dialog for creating or editing a sale item, featuring product search, sale price input with auto-calculated discount percentage, and date range fields.
frontend/src/components/admin/store-deta: Renders Save and Restore action buttons for the store details form, disabling them when there are no changes or a save is in progress.
Form component for editing store details including basic info (name, address, email, phone, WhatsApp), social media links, and per-day store hours with validation error display.
Displays a read-only preview of store details (name, address, phone, email, hours, coordinates) as they would appear on the contact page.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Reusable dropdown component that fetches categories from the backend via a hook and renders them as select options, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and inline/full-page display modes using a Lucide Loader2 icon.
frontend/src/components/public/CookieCon: Displays a cookie consent banner that prompts users to accept or decline cookies, hiding itself on the privacy page or if consent has already been set.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Cate: Renders a single product category section with a heading, 'view all' navigation button, and a responsive product grid limited to 4 items on mobile and 5 on desktop.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Home: Composes the homepage hero area by combining the StoreBanner and SearchBar components within a full-width layout.
Renders an infinite-scrolling list of category sections on the homepage, loading more categories as the user scrolls using an intersection observer sentinel.
frontend/src/components/public/home/sear: Dropdown listbox component that displays autocomplete search results, a loading spinner, an error message, or a no-results message based on current state.
Search input with autocomplete dropdown that fetches product suggestions, handles keyboard/mouse navigation, and opens a product modal on selection while managing blob URL cleanup.
Renders a single search result row as a button, displaying product name, category, and price (sale price if active).
frontend/src/components/public/home/Stor: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, and centered store branding text describing Kelani Cosmetics.
frontend/src/components/public/product/C: Button component that copies provided text to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a textarea fallback, showing a success/error toast and a temporary checkmark icon.
frontend/src/components/public/product/P: Modal dialog that displays full product details (image, price, sale info, stock status, store selector, share button) for both ProductWithSale and HomepageSearchResult data types, using URL-based navigation for open/close state.
Thin wrapper component that mounts ProductDetailsModal at the PublicLayout level to provide consistent modal rendering across public pages.
frontend/src/components/public/product/S: Button that shares a product URL via the Web Share API if available, falling back to clipboard copy, with a temporary 'copied' confirmation state.
Expandable button group that lets users select a store and opens a WhatsApp contact link for the chosen store regarding a specific product.
frontend/src/components/public/products/: Memoized card component displaying a product's image, name, sale/discount badges, stock indicators, and price, triggering an onClick callback when clicked.
Memoized responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components and opens the product modal with history on card click.
Displays color-coded stock status badges for two stores with tooltips; handles mobile tap-to-toggle tooltip behavior with auto-dismiss and outside-click dismissal.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicFoo: Renders the public site footer with a brand banner, store details (address, phone, hours) fetched via hook, and bottom navigation links including privacy policy.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicHea: Sticky top header for the public site with a hamburger menu button, logo link, and a desktop-only contact navigation link.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicSid: Slide-in side navigation panel with main links (Home, Contact, Privacy) and a scrollable list of public categories fetched on open, closeable via overlay click or Escape key.
Empty test file for the SafeSelect component.
frontend/src/components/SafeSelect.tsx: Wrapper around the shadcn Select component that enforces sentinel values ('all', 'none', 'no-change') to prevent empty string errors, with helpers for state initialization and sentinel-to-null conversion.
frontend/src/components/seo/SeoHead.tsx: Headless component that imperatively sets document title and injects/updates meta, Open Graph, Twitter, and canonical link tags in the document head, removing them on unmount.
frontend/src/components/seo/seoPresets.t: Defines SEO metadata presets (title, description, Open Graph, Twitter tags) for the home, contact, and privacy pages of the Kelani Cosmetics site.
Renders an individual toast notification card with type-specific icons/styles, auto-dismiss timer that pauses on hover, and an exit animation on dismiss.
frontend/src/components/toast/ToastViewp: Renders the container for all active toast notifications by reading from the toast store and mapping each to a ToastCard component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExport.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching export statistics (category/product counts) and triggering a full data export mutation via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminImport.ts: Provides an async importData function that calls the backend batchImportData method and maps errors (unauthorized, invalid category, generic) to typed API errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUserManagemen: Provides React Query hooks for listing managed users and mutations for promoting or demoting users to/from admin roles via the backend actor.
Verifies whether the current user is an admin by querying the backend, with a 30-day cache stored in the auth store to avoid redundant checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useBothStoreDetails.t: Fetches details for both physical store locations in a single backend call using React Query, with a stabilized actor reference and 30-minute cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryOptions.ts: Transforms backend categories into value/label option objects suitable for dropdown components, built on top of the useGetAllCategories query hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsIn: Custom hook for infinite-scroll pagination of category products, accumulating pages internally and resetting state when categoryId or pageSize changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsPa: Hook for fetching a single page of category products with featured-first ordering, using a stable actor reference to avoid duplicate requests.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageAutocomple: Hook that debounces a search query (300ms) and fetches up to 10 homepage search results from the backend when the query is at least 2 characters.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageCategories: Hook for infinite-scroll loading of homepage categories, accumulating paginated results and exposing a loadMore callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInfiniteScroll.ts: Hook that triggers a loadMore callback via IntersectionObserver (with rAF-throttled scroll fallback) when the user scrolls within a threshold of the page bottom, with a 1-second cooldown.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, clear, status) via AuthClient, persisting identity across page reloads and exposing a React provider and consumer hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Thin wrapper around IntersectionObserver that returns a ref and a boolean indicating whether the referenced element is currently intersecting the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts: Provides reactive media query matching hooks, including convenience helpers useIsMobile (≤768px) and useIsTouchDevice.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductModalNaviga: Manages product modal open/close state in sync with browser history, pushing a history entry on open and handling both UI-triggered and back-button-triggered closes via popstate events.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductPhotoBlobUr: Converts a Uint8Array product photo into a memoized blob URL, revoking the previous URL when the photo changes or the component unmounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mapping utilities for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting products, supporting paginated search and sale-aware product fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSearchForSa: Debounced React Query hook that searches products (minimum 2 characters) for use in sale item creation/editing, returning filtered results with price data.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicCategories.t: Fetches all categories for public pages using a stable actor reference, only triggering the query when a side panel is open.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all categories or a single category by ID, plus mutations for creating, updating, and deleting categories with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequireAdminNaviga: Redirects authenticated non-admin users to the /admin login page and exposes access and verification state for guarding admin routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaleItemQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and utilities for paginated sale item fetching, CRUD mutations, and sale status calculation, mapping backend BigInt fields to a UI-friendly SaleItem type.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoreDetailsQuerie: Provides React Query hooks and type conversions for fetching and mutating store details, handling coordinate serialization and BigInt timestamp conversion between backend and UI types.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncAuthFromIntern: Syncs the Internet Identity principal into the auth Zustand store whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useToggleProductFeatu: Provides a mutation hook that toggles a product's featured status with optimistic updates and rollback on error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and styles toast notification animations.
frontend/src/layouts/admin/DashboardLayo: Admin dashboard layout component that composes the header, collapsible sidebar, and main content area with responsive padding.
frontend/src/layouts/public/PublicLayout: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a header, side panel, footer, product modal host, and cookie consent banner.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected admin route component that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and admin role verification, showing appropriate loading or denial states.
Admin page for managing product categories with search, create, edit, delete, and reorder functionality using dialogs and a table/card layout.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardHomePa: Admin dashboard home page that renders a grid of navigation cards linking to major admin sections like products, categories, and store settings.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExportPage.tsx: Admin page that fetches store statistics and exports product/category data as a formatted JSON file download, with BigInt serialization support and last-export tracking via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ImportPage.tsx: Admin page that accepts a drag-and-drop or file-input JSON upload, validates and parses it (with BigInt support), then imports categories and products via a mutation hook, displaying progress and results.
frontend/src/pages/admin/OnSaleProductsP: Admin page for managing on-sale products with paginated, searchable, and filterable listings, supporting add/edit/delete operations via modals and dialogs with responsive table/card views.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductsPage.ts: Admin page for managing the product catalog with debounced search, category filtering, pagination, and add/edit/delete functionality, fetching store names to label per-store inventory columns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StoreDetailsPag: Admin page with a two-tab interface for editing and previewing details for two stores, handling form state, validation, and update mutations with error reporting and cache cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UserManagementP: Admin page for managing user roles, allowing admins to search users, promote them to admin, demote them to regular users, and add new admins by Principal ID. Includes access control via `useAdminVerification` and shows `AccessDenied` for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/public/CategoryPage.t: Public page that displays products belonging to a specific category using infinite scroll pagination, fetching data via `useCategoryProductsInfinite` and rendering them in a `ProductGrid`.
frontend/src/pages/public/ContactoPage.t: Public contact page that displays store details (address, phone, social links, hours) fetched via `useBothStoreDetails`, and conditionally renders an embedded Google Map based on cookie consent.
frontend/src/pages/public/HomePage.tsx: Public home page that renders a hero section and infinite-scroll categories section using store details and category data, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/public/PrivacyPage.ts: Static privacy policy page for Kelani Cosmetics that follows the app's loading pattern with a brief actor-based initialization delay before rendering the full policy content.
frontend/src/pages/public/ProductPage.ts: Public product detail page that fetches a product by barcode, displays its image, price, sale badge, stock status, store selector, and share button, with SEO metadata and loading/error states.
frontend/src/router.tsx: Defines the application route tree using TanStack Router, organizing public routes (home, contact, privacy, category, product) under a shared PublicLayout and admin routes (dashboard, products, categories, etc.) under an AdminRoute.
frontend/src/session-worker.js: A Web Worker that sends a keep-alive message to the main thread every 60 seconds to prevent session timeouts, with support for a stop message to clean up the interval.
frontend/src/stores/authStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for authentication state, tracking the user's principal, admin status, and a 30-day cache timestamp for admin checks.
frontend/src/stores/productModalStore.ts: Zustand store managing the product detail modal's open/close state, the displayed product data, store details, and a precomputed blob URL that is revoked on modal close.
frontend/src/stores/toastStore.ts: Zustand store for managing toast notifications with type-based default durations, plus convenience helper functions (toast.success, toast.error, etc.) for adding toasts.
frontend/src/utils/adminDate.ts: Provides utility functions for converting between HTML date input strings, JavaScript Date objects, and nanosecond BigInt timestamps used by the Internet Computer backend, with validation helpers for date ranges.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.te: Empty test file for ApiResponseHandler utilities.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.ts: Provides standardized API response handling with BigInt-aware JSON parsing, a custom ApiError class, error creation helpers, and retry logic for network/server errors.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.test: Empty test file for BigIntSerializer utilities.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.ts: Utilities for safely converting between BigInt and strings, and a custom JSON parser that automatically converts timestamp fields (e.g., createdDate, lastUpdatedDate) to BigInt to preserve ICP nanosecond precision.
frontend/src/utils/categoryNumeric.ts: Provides safe conversion utilities between UI number types and Candid bigint types for Category fields, including a helper for converting reorder arrays to bigint tuples.
frontend/src/utils/cookieUtils.ts: Manages GDPR cookie consent preferences using localStorage, exposing functions to get, set, and check consent status while dispatching custom events on changes.
frontend/src/utils/googleMaps.ts: Parses JSON coordinate strings and generates Google Maps directions URLs from latitude/longitude data.
frontend/src/utils/imageWebp.ts: Validates image file type and size, converts images to WebP format using a canvas, and provides blob URL creation/revocation helpers.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.test: Empty test file for importValidation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.ts: Validates and converts imported JSON data (categories and products) to the correct backend types, with special handling for BigInt timestamp fields and detailed Spanish-language error messages.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.test: Empty test file for NumericConverter utilities.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.ts: Utility functions for safely converting and validating numeric values, including IVA rates (0/4/10/21), profit margins (1–100), stock-to-boolean conversion, and Spanish-formatted price display.
frontend/src/utils/phoneFormat.ts: Formats phone numbers for display and for WhatsApp API links by stripping non-numeric characters and normalizing country codes.
frontend/src/utils/productImage.ts: Provides a default product image URL fallback and a helper to check whether a product has real photo data.
Wraps error, warning, success, and info reporting by logging details to the console and displaying user-friendly toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/storeDetailsValidatio: Defines validation logic for store details form fields including email, phone, WhatsApp, coordinates, and store hours, returning structured error messages.
frontend/src/utils/storeHoursFormat.ts: Formats store hours data for display by mapping English day keys to Spanish labels and providing translation utilities for backend day name strings.
frontend/src/utils/throttle.ts: Implements a throttle higher-order function that limits how often a callback can be invoked, scheduling a trailing call if invocations occur within the delay window.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappContact.ts: Utility functions to build and open WhatsApp URLs with pre-filled Spanish product inquiry messages using a formatted phone number and encoded text.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing an e-commerce app with a pending fix request to add the `description` field to the `searchHomepageProducts` backend function's returned product records.
